---
title: "anova_stats"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

# 1. ONE-WAY ANOVA — FULL SIX-TIMEPOINT MODEL (D14-M18)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

cellular  <- read.csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
soluble   <- read.csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
insoluble <- read.csv("insoluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")

out_dir <- "holistic_proteomics"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

get_sample_cols <- function(df) grep("Quantity\\.log2$", colnames(df), value = TRUE)
get_timepoint   <- function(col) sub("\\..*$", "", col)

run_anova <- function(df, fraction_name) {
  sample_cols <- get_sample_cols(df)
  timepoints  <- factor(get_timepoint(sample_cols),
                        levels = c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18"))

  mat <- as.matrix(df[, sample_cols])
  rownames(mat) <- df$gene_symbol
  mat[mat == 0] <- NA

  keep <- rowSums(!is.na(mat)) >= 3
  mat  <- mat[keep, ]

  mat_filled <- t(apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
    x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    x
  }))

  anova_results <- apply(mat_filled, 1, function(x) {
    fit <- tryCatch(aov(x ~ timepoints), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fit)) return(c(f_stat = NA, p_value = NA))
    s <- summary(fit)[[1]]
    c(f_stat  = s["timepoints", "F value"],
      p_value = s["timepoints", "Pr(>F)"])
  })

  result_df <- as.data.frame(t(anova_results)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene_symbol") %>%
    mutate(
      padj           = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
      is_significant = !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05,
      fraction       = fraction_name
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj)

  write.csv(result_df,
            file.path(out_dir, paste0(tolower(fraction_name), "_anova_results.csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)

  sig <- result_df %>% dplyr::filter(is_significant)
  message(fraction_name, " - total proteins tested: ", nrow(result_df))
  message(fraction_name, " - significant (padj < 0.05): ", nrow(sig))

  result_df
}

cellular_anova  <- run_anova(cellular,  "cellular")
soluble_anova   <- run_anova(soluble,   "soluble")
insoluble_anova <- run_anova(insoluble, "insoluble")

combined <- bind_rows(cellular_anova, soluble_anova, insoluble_anova)
write.csv(combined, file.path(out_dir, "combined_anova_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# 2. ONE-WAY ANOVA — M03-ONWARDS MODEL (M03, M06, M12, M18)

cellular  <- read.csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
soluble   <- read.csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
insoluble <- read.csv("insoluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")

tp_levels_m3 <- c("M03", "M06", "M12", "M18")

impute_rowmeans <- function(m) {
  t(apply(m, 1, function(x) { x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE); x }))
}

run_anova <- function(df, fraction_name, tp_keep, suffix = "") {
  sample_cols <- get_sample_cols(df)
  tp_char_all <- get_timepoint(sample_cols)

  keep_cols  <- sample_cols[tp_char_all %in% tp_keep]
  tp_char    <- tp_char_all[tp_char_all %in% tp_keep]
  timepoints <- factor(tp_char, levels = tp_keep)

  mat <- as.matrix(df[, keep_cols])
  rownames(mat) <- df$gene_symbol
  mat[mat == 0] <- NA
  keep <- rowSums(!is.na(mat)) >= 3
  mat  <- mat[keep, ]

  mat_filled <- impute_rowmeans(mat)

  anova_results <- apply(mat_filled, 1, function(x) {
    fit <- tryCatch(aov(x ~ timepoints), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fit)) return(c(f_stat = NA, p_value = NA))
    s <- summary(fit)[[1]]
    c(f_stat  = s["timepoints", "F value"],
      p_value = s["timepoints", "Pr(>F)"])
  })

  result_df <- as.data.frame(t(anova_results)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene_symbol") %>%
    mutate(
      padj           = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
      is_significant = !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05,
      fraction       = fraction_name
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj)

  result_df
}

cellular_anova_m3  <- run_anova(cellular,  "Cellular",  tp_levels_m3, suffix = "m3")
soluble_anova_m3   <- run_anova(soluble,   "Soluble",   tp_levels_m3, suffix = "m3")
insoluble_anova_m3 <- run_anova(insoluble, "Insoluble", tp_levels_m3, suffix = "m3")



# 3. TOP-100 CROSS-FRACTION OVERLAP HEATMAP

library(pheatmap)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(readxl)

out_dir      <- "holistic_proteomics"
tp_levels    <- c("D14", "D21", "M03", "M06", "M12", "M18")
tp_levels_m3 <- c("M03", "M06", "M12", "M18")

cellular <- read.csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
soluble  <- read.csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")

preprocess_insoluble <- function(filepath) {
  df <- read_excel(filepath, skip = 1)
  df <- dplyr::rename(df, gene_symbol = `Gene Name`)
  tp_map <- c("14D" = "D14", "21D" = "D21", "3M" = "M03",
               "6M"  = "M06", "12M" = "M12", "18M" = "M18")
  sample_cols <- grep("\\.PG\\.Quantity$", colnames(df), value = TRUE)
  new_names <- vapply(sample_cols, function(col) {
    tp_raw  <- regmatches(col, regexpr("\\d+[DM](?=_)", col, perl = TRUE))
    rep_num <- regmatches(col, regexpr("(?<=_)\\d+(?=C_)", col, perl = TRUE))
    paste0(tp_map[tp_raw], ".rep", rep_num, ".Quantity.log2")
  }, character(1))
  colnames(df)[match(sample_cols, colnames(df))] <- new_names
  df[new_names] <- lapply(df[new_names], as.numeric)
  as.data.frame(df)
}

insoluble <- preprocess_insoluble("InsolubleFraction_Astral.xlsx")

cell_anova  <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "cellular_anova_results.csv"))
sol_anova   <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "soluble_anova_results.csv"))
insol_anova <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "insoluble_anova_results.csv"))

cell_anova_m3  <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "cellular_m3_anova_results.csv"))
sol_anova_m3   <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "soluble_m3_anova_results.csv"))
insol_anova_m3 <- read.csv(file.path(out_dir, "insoluble_m3_anova_results.csv"))

get_top_overlap <- function(anova_cell, anova_sol, anova_insol, n = 100) {
  sig_cell  <- anova_cell  %>% filter(is_significant) %>% mutate(rank_cell  = row_number())
  sig_sol   <- anova_sol   %>% filter(is_significant) %>% mutate(rank_sol   = row_number())
  sig_insol <- anova_insol %>% filter(is_significant) %>% mutate(rank_insol = row_number())

  inner_join(sig_cell  %>% select(gene_symbol, rank_cell),
             sig_sol   %>% select(gene_symbol, rank_sol),   by = "gene_symbol") %>%
    inner_join(sig_insol %>% select(gene_symbol, rank_insol), by = "gene_symbol") %>%
    mutate(mean_rank = (rank_cell + rank_sol + rank_insol) / 3) %>%
    arrange(mean_rank) %>%
    slice(1:n)
}

overlap_genes    <- get_top_overlap(cell_anova,    sol_anova,    insol_anova)
overlap_genes_m3 <- get_top_overlap(cell_anova_m3, sol_anova_m3, insol_anova_m3)

write.csv(overlap_genes,    file.path(out_dir, "overlap_top100_genes.csv"),    row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(overlap_genes_m3, file.path(out_dir, "overlap_top100_genes_m3.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

build_expr_mat <- function(df, fraction_prefix, tp_keep) {
  sample_cols <- get_sample_cols(df)
  tp_char_all <- get_timepoint(sample_cols)
  keep_cols   <- sample_cols[tp_char_all %in% tp_keep]
  tp_char     <- tp_char_all[tp_char_all %in% tp_keep]

  mat <- as.matrix(df[, keep_cols])
  rownames(mat) <- df$gene_symbol
  mat[mat == 0] <- NA
  mat <- impute_rowmeans(mat)

  rep_idx    <- ave(tp_char, tp_char, FUN = function(x) seq_along(x))
  clean_cols <- paste0(fraction_prefix, "_", tp_char, "_rep", rep_idx)
  colnames(mat) <- clean_cols

  col_order <- order(match(tp_char, tp_keep))
  mat <- mat[, col_order]
  annot <- data.frame(
    Timepoint = factor(tp_char[col_order], levels = tp_keep),
    row.names = clean_cols[col_order]
  )
  list(mat = mat, annot = annot)
}

cell_obj     <- build_expr_mat(cellular,  "C", tp_levels)
sol_obj      <- build_expr_mat(soluble,   "S", tp_levels)
insol_obj    <- build_expr_mat(insoluble, "I", tp_levels)

cell_obj_m3  <- build_expr_mat(cellular,  "C", tp_levels_m3)
sol_obj_m3   <- build_expr_mat(soluble,   "S", tp_levels_m3)
insol_obj_m3 <- build_expr_mat(insoluble, "I", tp_levels_m3)

ann_colors <- list(
  Timepoint = c(D14 = "#2166ac", D21 = "#74add1", M03 = "#abd9e9",
                M06 = "#fdae61", M12 = "#d73027", M18 = "#a50026"),
  Fraction  = c(Cellular = "#1b7837", Soluble = "#762a83", Insoluble = "#e08214")
)

ann_colors_m3 <- list(
  Timepoint = c(M03 = "#abd9e9", M06 = "#fdae61", M12 = "#d73027", M18 = "#a50026"),
  Fraction  = c(Cellular = "#1b7837", Soluble = "#762a83", Insoluble = "#e08214")
)

make_overlap_heatmap <- function(expr_cell, expr_sol, expr_insol,
                                  genes, ann_col_colors, filename) {
  prep_mat <- function(obj, genes, fraction_label) {
    g <- intersect(genes, rownames(obj$mat))
    m <- obj$mat[g, , drop = FALSE]
    m <- m[apply(m, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
    annot <- obj$annot[colnames(m), , drop = FALSE]
    annot$Fraction <- fraction_label
    list(mat = m, annot = annot)
  }

  pc <- prep_mat(expr_cell,  genes, "Cellular")
  ps <- prep_mat(expr_sol,   genes, "Soluble")
  pi <- prep_mat(expr_insol, genes, "Insoluble")

  common_genes <- Reduce(intersect, list(rownames(pc$mat), rownames(ps$mat), rownames(pi$mat)))
  if (length(common_genes) == 0) {
    message("No common genes across all three fractions.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  scale_mat <- function(m) t(scale(t(m[common_genes, ])))
  combined_mat <- cbind(scale_mat(pc$mat), scale_mat(ps$mat), scale_mat(pi$mat))

  combined_annot <- rbind(pc$annot, ps$annot, pi$annot)[colnames(combined_mat), ]
  combined_annot$Fraction <- factor(combined_annot$Fraction,
                                     levels = c("Cellular", "Soluble", "Insoluble"))

  n_genes      <- length(common_genes)
  row_fontsize <- dplyr::case_when(
    n_genes <= 50  ~ 11,
    n_genes <= 100 ~ 9,
    n_genes <= 150 ~ 7,
    TRUE           ~ 5
  )

  gaps <- c(ncol(pc$mat), ncol(pc$mat) + ncol(ps$mat))

  ph <- pheatmap(
    combined_mat, scale = "none", cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
    annotation_col = combined_annot, annotation_colors = ann_col_colors,
    gaps_col = gaps, show_rownames = TRUE, show_colnames = FALSE,
    fontsize_row = row_fontsize, silent = TRUE, filename = NA
  )

  png(file.path(out_dir, filename), width = 14, height = 14, units = "in", res = 150)
  g <- ph$gtable
  row_name_idx <- which(g$layout$name == "row_names")
  if (length(row_name_idx) > 0) {
    g$grobs[[row_name_idx]]$gp <- gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = row_fontsize)
  } else {
    for (i in seq_along(g$grobs)) {
      if (inherits(g$grobs[[i]], "text")) {
        g$grobs[[i]]$gp$fontface <- "bold"
        g$grobs[[i]]$gp$fontsize <- row_fontsize
      }
    }
  }
  grid.draw(g)
  dev.off()
  message("Saved: ", filename)
}

make_overlap_heatmap(cell_obj, sol_obj, insol_obj, genes = overlap_genes$gene_symbol,
                      ann_col_colors = ann_colors, filename = "overlap_top100_combined_heatmap.png")

make_overlap_heatmap(cell_obj_m3, sol_obj_m3, insol_obj_m3, genes = overlap_genes_m3$gene_symbol,
                      ann_col_colors = ann_colors_m3, filename = "overlap_top100_m3_combined_heatmap.png")



# 4. TRAJECTORY CLUSTERING + GO:BP/KEGG ENRICHMENT 


library(tidyverse)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(rrvgo)
library(GO.db)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(gprofiler2)
library(patchwork)

select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter

anova_cellular  <- read.csv("holistic_proteomics/cellular_anova_results.csv")
anova_soluble   <- read.csv("holistic_proteomics/soluble_anova_results.csv")
anova_insoluble <- read.csv("holistic_proteomics/insoluble_anova_results.csv")

cellular  <- read.csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
soluble   <- read.csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
insoluble <- read.csv("insoluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")

timepoint_cols <- c("mean_log2_D14", "mean_log2_D21", "mean_log2_M03",
                     "mean_log2_M06", "mean_log2_M12", "mean_log2_M18")

fraction_colours <- c("Cellular" = "#0072B2", "Soluble" = "#E69F00", "Insoluble" = "#009E73")
cluster_palette  <- c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73", "#D55E00",
                       "#CC79A7", "#F0E442", "#56B4E9", "#999999")

dissertation_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "Carlito") +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(family = "Carlito", size = 9.5, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30"),
    strip.text       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 10, colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "grey20", linewidth = 0.6),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(family = "Carlito", face = "bold", size = 10, colour = "black"),
    axis.text        = element_text(family = "Carlito", size = 8.5, colour = "black"),
    legend.position  = "none"
  )

# Trajectory matrices + k-means clustering
build_traj_matrix <- function(anova_df, proteomics_df, fraction_name) {
  sig_genes <- anova_df %>% dplyr::filter(is_significant == TRUE) %>% dplyr::pull(gene_symbol)

  traj <- proteomics_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene_symbol %in% sig_genes) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gene_symbol)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(gene_symbol, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_symbol, all_of(timepoint_cols)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(complete.cases(.))

  mat <- traj %>% dplyr::select(-gene_symbol) %>% as.matrix()
  rownames(mat) <- traj$gene_symbol

  mat_z <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  mat_z <- mat_z[complete.cases(mat_z), ]

  cat(fraction_name, ": ", nrow(mat_z), "significant proteins with complete trajectories\n")
  mat_z
}

mat_cellular  <- build_traj_matrix(anova_cellular,  cellular,  "Cellular")
mat_soluble   <- build_traj_matrix(anova_soluble,   soluble,   "Soluble")
mat_insoluble <- build_traj_matrix(anova_insoluble, insoluble, "Insoluble")

choose_k_and_cluster <- function(mat_z, fraction_name, k_range = 2:8, seed = 42) {
  set.seed(seed)
  sil_scores <- map_dbl(k_range, function(k) {
    km <- kmeans(mat_z, centers = k, nstart = 25)
    ss <- silhouette(km$cluster, dist(mat_z))
    mean(ss[, 3])
  })
  sil_df <- tibble(k = k_range, avg_silhouette = sil_scores)
  best_k <- sil_df$k[which.max(sil_df$avg_silhouette)]
  cat(fraction_name, ": optimal k =", best_k, "(silhouette =", round(max(sil_scores), 3), ")\n")
  set.seed(seed)
  km_final <- kmeans(mat_z, centers = best_k, nstart = 25)
  list(sil_df = sil_df, best_k = best_k, kmeans_fit = km_final)
}

res_cellular  <- choose_k_and_cluster(mat_cellular,  "Cellular")
res_soluble   <- choose_k_and_cluster(mat_soluble,   "Soluble")
res_insoluble <- choose_k_and_cluster(mat_insoluble, "Insoluble")

make_long_traj <- function(mat_z, km_fit, fraction_name) {
  as.data.frame(mat_z) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene_symbol") %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(km_fit$cluster[gene_symbol]), Fraction = fraction_name) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(timepoint_cols), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "z_score") %>%
    mutate(Timepoint = gsub("mean_log2_", "", Timepoint),
           Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18")),
           Timepoint_numeric = as.numeric(Timepoint))
}

long_cellular  <- make_long_traj(mat_cellular,  res_cellular$kmeans_fit,  "Cellular")
long_soluble   <- make_long_traj(mat_soluble,   res_soluble$kmeans_fit,   "Soluble")
long_insoluble <- make_long_traj(mat_insoluble, res_insoluble$kmeans_fit, "Insoluble")

# Trajectory plots
plot_fraction_trajectories <- function(long_df, fraction_name, n_clusters) {
  ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Timepoint_numeric, y = z_score)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = gene_symbol), alpha = 0.07, colour = "grey40") +
    geom_smooth(aes(group = cluster), method = "loess", se = TRUE,
                linewidth = 1.2, span = 0.75,
                colour = fraction_colours[fraction_name],
                fill = fraction_colours[fraction_name], alpha = 0.15) +
    facet_wrap(~cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = label_both) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:6, labels = c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18")) +
    labs(title = fraction_name, subtitle = paste0("k = ", n_clusters, " (silhouette-selected)"),
         x = "Timepoint", y = "z-scored log2 abundance") +
    dissertation_theme +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold", size = 8))
}

p_traj_cellular  <- plot_fraction_trajectories(long_cellular,  "Cellular",  res_cellular$best_k)
p_traj_soluble   <- plot_fraction_trajectories(long_soluble,   "Soluble",   res_soluble$best_k)
p_traj_insoluble <- plot_fraction_trajectories(long_insoluble, "Insoluble", res_insoluble$best_k)

# Per-gene temporal change magnitude
compute_change_magnitude <- function(proteomics_df) {
  proteomics_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gene_symbol)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(gene_symbol, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_symbol, all_of(timepoint_cols)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      range_change = max(c_across(all_of(timepoint_cols))) - min(c_across(all_of(timepoint_cols))),
      total_variation = sum(abs(diff(c_across(all_of(timepoint_cols))))),
      d14_to_m18_change = abs(mean_log2_M18 - mean_log2_D14)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_symbol, range_change, total_variation, d14_to_m18_change)
}

magnitude_cellular  <- compute_change_magnitude(cellular)
magnitude_soluble   <- compute_change_magnitude(soluble)
magnitude_insoluble <- compute_change_magnitude(insoluble)

# Cluster membership + background gene sets
membership_cellular  <- long_cellular  %>% distinct(gene_symbol, cluster)
membership_soluble   <- long_soluble   %>% distinct(gene_symbol, cluster)
membership_insoluble <- long_insoluble %>% distinct(gene_symbol, cluster)

bg_cellular  <- unique(membership_cellular$gene_symbol)
bg_soluble   <- unique(membership_soluble$gene_symbol)
bg_insoluble <- unique(membership_insoluble$gene_symbol)

# GO:BP + KEGG enrichment per cluster
run_cluster_enrichment <- function(membership_df, background, fraction_name,
                                    organism = "mmusculus") {
  clusters <- sort(unique(membership_df$cluster))
  map_dfr(clusters, function(cl) {
    genes <- membership_df %>% filter(cluster == cl) %>% pull(gene_symbol)
    if (length(genes) < 3) return(NULL)

    res <- gost(
      query = genes, organism = organism, correction_method = "fdr",
      sources = c("GO:BP", "KEGG"), custom_bg = background, evcodes = TRUE
    )
    if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)

    res$result %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(cluster = as.character(cl), Fraction = fraction_name)
  })
}

enrich_cellular  <- run_cluster_enrichment(membership_cellular,  bg_cellular,  "Cellular")
enrich_soluble   <- run_cluster_enrichment(membership_soluble,   bg_soluble,   "Soluble")
enrich_insoluble <- run_cluster_enrichment(membership_insoluble, bg_insoluble, "Insoluble")

# GO:BP redundancy reduction (rrvgo)
prep_enrichment_for_reduction <- function(enrich_df) {
  enrich_df %>%
    mutate(term_name_norm = str_to_lower(term_name),
           term_name_norm = str_replace_all(term_name_norm, "-", " "))
}

dedupe_case_variants <- function(enrich_df) {
  enrich_df %>%
    group_by(cluster, source, term_name_norm) %>%
    slice_min(order_by = p_value, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()
}

reduce_go_redundancy <- function(enrich_df, fraction_name, threshold = 0.7) {
  clusters <- sort(unique(enrich_df$cluster))
  map_dfr(clusters, function(cl) {
    cluster_df <- enrich_df %>% filter(cluster == cl)
    go_df   <- cluster_df %>% filter(source == "GO:BP")
    kegg_df <- cluster_df %>% filter(source == "KEGG")
    if (nrow(go_df) < 2) return(bind_rows(go_df, kegg_df))
    simMatrix <- tryCatch(
      calculateSimMatrix(go_df$term_id, orgdb = "org.Mm.eg.db", ont = "BP", method = "Rel"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(simMatrix) || nrow(simMatrix) < 2) {
      cat(fraction_name, "- Cluster", cl, ": simMatrix failed, keeping all GO terms\n")
      return(bind_rows(go_df, kegg_df))
    }
    scores <- setNames(-log10(go_df$p_value), go_df$term_id)
    scores <- scores[rownames(simMatrix)]
    reducedTerms <- reduceSimMatrix(simMatrix, scores, threshold = threshold, orgdb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
    parent_ids <- unique(reducedTerms$parent)
    go_df_reduced <- go_df %>% filter(term_id %in% parent_ids)
    cat(fraction_name, "- Cluster", cl, ": GO:BP", nrow(go_df), "->", nrow(go_df_reduced), "terms\n")
    bind_rows(go_df_reduced, kegg_df)
  })
}

enrich_cellular  <- enrich_cellular  %>% prep_enrichment_for_reduction() %>% dedupe_case_variants()
enrich_soluble   <- enrich_soluble   %>% prep_enrichment_for_reduction() %>% dedupe_case_variants()
enrich_insoluble <- enrich_insoluble %>% prep_enrichment_for_reduction() %>% dedupe_case_variants()

enrich_cellular_reduced  <- reduce_go_redundancy(enrich_cellular,  "Cellular")
enrich_soluble_reduced   <- reduce_go_redundancy(enrich_soluble,   "Soluble")
enrich_insoluble_reduced <- reduce_go_redundancy(enrich_insoluble, "Insoluble")

# Score terms by temporal change magnitude 
score_terms_by_magnitude <- function(enrich_df, magnitude_df, n_top = 5,
                                      magnitude_metric = "range_change") {
  enrich_df %>%
    filter(source %in% c("GO:BP", "KEGG"), p_value < 0.05) %>%
    mutate(intersection_genes = str_split(intersection, ",")) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      mean_magnitude = mean(
        magnitude_df[[magnitude_metric]][magnitude_df$gene_symbol %in% intersection_genes],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_intersect_genes = length(intersection_genes)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(!is.na(mean_magnitude)) %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = mean_magnitude, n = n_top, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(term_label = str_trunc(term_name, 55), cluster = factor(cluster))
}

plot_cellular  <- score_terms_by_magnitude(enrich_cellular_reduced,  magnitude_cellular)
plot_soluble   <- score_terms_by_magnitude(enrich_soluble_reduced,   magnitude_soluble)
plot_insoluble <- score_terms_by_magnitude(enrich_insoluble_reduced, magnitude_insoluble)

# Enrichment barplots
make_magnitude_barplot <- function(plot_df, fraction_name) {
  n_clusters <- length(unique(plot_df$cluster))
  pal <- setNames(cluster_palette[1:n_clusters], levels(plot_df$cluster))

  plot_df <- plot_df %>% mutate(term_label = fct_reorder(term_label, mean_magnitude))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = term_label, y = mean_magnitude, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~cluster, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, labeller = label_both) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean temporal change (log2 range, D14\u2192M18)") +
    dissertation_theme +
    theme(strip.text = element_text(colour = "grey10"))
}

p_enrich_cellular  <- make_magnitude_barplot(plot_cellular,  "Cellular")
p_enrich_soluble   <- make_magnitude_barplot(plot_soluble,   "Soluble")
p_enrich_insoluble <- make_magnitude_barplot(plot_insoluble, "Insoluble")

# Combined portrait figures (trajectory + enrichment)
build_fraction_figure <- function(p_traj, p_enrich, fraction_name) {
  (p_traj / p_enrich + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2.2))) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = paste0(fraction_name, " fraction: temporal protein trajectories and GO:BP/KEGG enrichment"),
      subtitle = "Silhouette-selected k; GO:BP terms rrvgo-reduced; enrichment ranked by mean temporal change of intersecting genes (FDR < 0.05)",
      tag_levels = "A"
    ) &
    theme(
      plot.tag      = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 15, colour = "black"),
      plot.title    = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(family = "Carlito", face = "bold", size = 10.5, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30")
    )
}

fig_cellular  <- build_fraction_figure(p_traj_cellular,  p_enrich_cellular,  "Cellular")
fig_soluble   <- build_fraction_figure(p_traj_soluble,   p_enrich_soluble,   "Soluble")
fig_insoluble <- build_fraction_figure(p_traj_insoluble, p_enrich_insoluble, "Insoluble")

ggsave("fig_cellular_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.pdf",  fig_cellular,  width = 10, height = 16, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("fig_cellular_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.png",  fig_cellular,  width = 10, height = 16, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("fig_soluble_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.pdf",   fig_soluble,   width = 10, height = 16, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("fig_soluble_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.png",   fig_soluble,   width = 10, height = 16, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("fig_insoluble_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.pdf", fig_insoluble, width = 10, height = 16, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("fig_insoluble_trajectory_enrichment_portrait.png", fig_insoluble, width = 10, height = 16, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
